login.promptCredentials: First enter your Google Cloud OAuth credentials in Settings.
login.title: Sign in with Google to start working

channels.title: My Channels
channels.confirmRemove: Remove account {{account}} and all its channels?
channels.empty: No channels found. Sign in with Google to load yours.

videos.title: Videos
videos.empty: This channel has no public videos.

video.noSourceCaptions: This video has no caption track to translate from. Add subtitles in YouTube Studio first.
video.title: Title:

languages.title: Choose target languages
languages.quotaWarning: This subtitle run will use about {{units}} YouTube quota units and may exceed your daily limit of {{limit}}. Continue?

errors.MISSING_OAUTH_CREDENTIALS: Google OAuth credentials are not set. Open Settings and add Client ID + Secret.
errors.NOT_AUTHENTICATED: You are not signed in. Sign in with Google first.
errors.NO_SOURCE_CAPTIONS: Video has no captions to translate from.
errors.EMPTY_SOURCE_CAPTION: The source caption track is empty.
errors.CUE_TRANSLATION_PARSE_FAILED: Could not read the translated subtitles. Please try again.
errors.NO_REFRESH_TOKEN_RECEIVED: Google did not return a refresh token. Sign in again and grant access.
errors.OAUTH_NO_CODE: Authorization was cancelled or returned no code.
errors.OAUTH_STATE_MISMATCH: Sign-in failed a security check. Please try again.
errors.NO_LANGUAGES_SELECTED: Select at least one target language.
